title: Azure OpenAI Added GPT-5 Models, Realtime Audio GA, And Model Router GPT-5 Support
summary: Azure OpenAI what's-new notes for August 2025 list GPT-5 family availability, GPT RealTime and Audio general availability, provisioned spillover GA, and model-router support for GPT-5 series models.

evidence_refs.license_note: Official Microsoft Learn page reviewed for factual metadata; no provider prose copied.

impacts.recommended_action: Review Azure OpenAI model allowlists, PTU plans, and model-router deployments for GPT-5 and realtime/audio model availability.

detail.migration_notes: This monthly Azure OpenAI entry groups several availability and routing changes; verify exact deployment region and access requirements before use.

limitations: The source groups these updates under August 2025, so APW uses an approximate month-start event date.
